commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Control UI chat session selector to hide inactive subagent/spawned sessions, keep the active subagent visible, and switch agents to the latest eligible normal/dashboard session before falling back to main.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows the switch target can be a newer subagent/spawned row and the normal picker can show inactive spawned subagent rows; I did not execute the UI because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Manual handling is required for the protected `maintainer` label and refreshed real-behavior proof; I did not find a narrow PR-introduced code defect for an automated repair lane.
